company.name: Legpro Solutions
company.headline: Delivering Tailored Staffing Solutions
company.description: LEGpro specializes in crafting secure and flexible recruiting solutions for various industries. With over five years of experience, we streamline the hiring process to connect businesses with the right candidates efficiently.

hero.headline: Delivering Tailored Staffing Solutions
hero.subheadline: Innovative recruitment strategies that reduce time-to-hire and cost-per-hire while enhancing workforce quality across diverse industries.

about.title: Legpro: Talent Acquisition
about.overview: LEGpro specializes in crafting secure and flexible recruiting solutions for various industries. With over five years of experience, we streamline the hiring process to connect businesses with the right candidates efficiently.
about.highlight: Our innovative recruitment strategies have significantly reduced time-to-hire and cost-per-hire for our clients while enhancing workforce quality and productivity.

mission.title: Our Mission Statement
mission.text: At LEGpro, our mission is to provide customized talent acquisition strategies that meet the unique needs of each client, ensuring they secure the best talent while maximizing efficiency and effectiveness in recruitment.

journey.title: A Legacy of Excellence in Recruitment
journey.text: Founded over five years ago, LEGpro emerged as a leader in recruitment solutions, pioneering methods that prioritize client needs and security. From humble beginnings, we have expanded our reach and expertise, solidifying our position as a trusted partner for businesses in diverse industries.

timeline.label: Founded with a vision to transform staffing

services.title: Permanent Staffing Solutions
services.description: Connect with top talent for long-term positions. We understand your culture and requirements to find candidates who fit seamlessly—with a focus on quality over quantity.

services.title: Contract Staffing Services
services.description: Rapid access to skilled professionals for temporary or project-based roles. We handle sourcing, vetting, and onboarding so you stay productive without long-term commitment.

services.title: Talent Acquisition Strategies
services.description: Tailored strategies for your organization's unique goals. We apply industry best practices and innovative technologies to attract the right talent and strengthen your employer brand.

services.title: Vetting and Compliance Services
services.description: Thorough background checks, reference verifications, and compliance assessments to mitigate hiring risks and maintain a trustworthy workforce.

services.title: NAPS, NATS & B.Voc Solutions
services.description: Government-aligned apprenticeship and vocational programs bridging education and industry—enhancing employability and workforce readiness.
details: NAPS: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme — on-the-job training with industry support.
NATS: National Apprenticeship Training Scheme — practical training for technical graduates.
B.Voc: Skill-based undergraduate programs with multiple exit options.

services.title: IT & Non-IT Hiring
services.description: End-to-end hiring across IT and non-IT roles—from skilled trades and manufacturing to corporate and technology positions across India.

training.title: English Training
training.description: Workplace communication and professional English skills to improve interview readiness and on-the-job performance.

training.title: Certification Programs
training.description: Industry-aligned certification pathways designed to validate skills and boost employability.

training.title: Skill Development Courses
training.description: Hands-on programs for ITI, Diploma, and skilled professionals—aligned with employer needs and apprenticeship schemes.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Legpro
points: Quality over quantity in every placement
Expertise across IT and non-IT sectors

footer.description: Legpro Solutions, powered by Legpro Consultants Pvt. Ltd., delivers tailored recruitment, staffing, and skill-development programs—connecting businesses with quality talent across India.

portals.label: Job Mela
portals.description: Browse openings, apply for jobs & manage your profile
